decisions.title_en: Qualcomm strikes AI chip deal with ByteDance for data centers
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in 7-day lookback. ByteDance to buy millions of Qualcomm ASICs for AI agent software; Qualcomm shares jumped up to 8.3% intraday on May 26. First high-profile non-Nvidia buyer for Qualcomm AI data-center silicon.

decisions.title_en: Jensen Huang attends NVIDIA Taipei T17/T18 employee event launching Taiwan HQ groundbreaking
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-23 ('Jensen 5-23 提前 9 天落地台北：Vera Rubin 单机 200 万零件 / 150 家台湾合作伙伴'). New info on 5-27: Jensen TODAY attends company-wide convention at Beitou T17/T18 plots, Taipei Mayor Chiang Wan-an also attends, official Taiwan HQ project launch — confirmed dated event, not just speculation.

decisions.title_en: Pope Leo XIV's encyclical links AI to historical slavery; historic Vatican apology
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-25 ('对 AI 解除武装、AI 不能留在少数人手中') and 5-23 / 5-18 prior coverage. New info: full reading of encyclical text reveals (1) Vatican's HISTORIC APOLOGY for legitimizing slavery in 15th-century papal bulls — not in prior coverage; (2) explicit link between AI-era labor (data labeling, content moderation, rare mineral mining for AI chips) and historical slave trade — substantively new framing not in prior coverage.

decisions.title_en: AI debt boom fuels surge in hyperscaler credit derivatives trading
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Bloomberg 5-23 reports hyperscalers have borrowed $250B+ globally for AI; BofA monthly notional CDS volume up 10× since 2025; Microsoft/Amazon/Oracle CDS hit $4.6B Q1 notional vs $759M YoY; hedge funds shorting cost of protection.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic $30B round at $900B closing this week
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-22 ('Anthropic $30B+ 新轮下周敲定 $900B+ 估值'). No confirmed close yet. The 'closing soon' angle was already covered. No substantive new information (no formal close announcement).

decisions.title_en: Anthropic moves Claude Agent SDK / claude -p / GitHub Actions / 3rd-party agents to separate metered credit on June 15
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-14 is 13 days old (>5 day limit). The announcement was made via @ClaudeDevs on May 13-14, well outside the freshness window.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft cancels internal Claude Code licenses by June 30 after token billing burned annual AI budget
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-14 is 13 days old (>5 day limit). Originally reported by The Verge / Tom Warren on May 14.

decisions.title_en: AMD ramps 6th-gen EPYC Venice CPUs on TSMC 2nm process
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-21 is 6 days old (>5 day limit). First HPC product to ramp on TSMC 2nm, but outside the freshness window.

decisions.title_en: HelpNetSecurity recap: Claude Mythos finds 10,000+ critical vulnerabilities
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-05-22 (anthropic-mythos-glasswing-disclosure: '10,000+ 高危漏洞, Cloudflare 单家 2,000 / 400 高危, Mozilla Firefox 150 现修 271 条'). May 26 HelpNet article is recap of Anthropic's May 22 Project Glasswing initial update — no substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: Salesforce Q1 FY27 earnings report Agentforce ARR
decisions.reason: Salesforce reports Q1 FY27 earnings tonight (post-market 5-27) but actual results / earnings call commentary not yet published. Pre-earnings preview alone is not substantive enough to publish without the actual numbers. Will revisit tomorrow if numbers / commentary land.
